long_description:

TIP Short Description: [ZONAL] wdc3-qz1-sr4-rk028-s34 in mzone777-zonelet01 is using more than 95% of memory for the last 10 minutes
TIP Situation: Zonal host high memory usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone777-zonelet01:host:wdc3-qz1-sr4-rk028-s34

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:

Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'mzone777-zonelet01' and host = 'wdc3-qz1-sr4-rk028-s34'
